reasoning: The current total resistance is the sum of R1 and R2, suggesting they are in series. To confirm, I will increase R1 and observe if the total resistance changes accordingly.
The total resistance increased proportionally when R1 was increased, confirming that the resistors are in series. Next, I will decrease R2 to see if the total resistance changes.
The total resistance decreased to the value of R1 when R2 was set to 0, confirming that the resistors are in series. Therefore, the total resistance is the sum of R1 and R2.
